introSection: Underground is a wooden enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Underground opened on April 27, 1996. It was built atop a former amphitheater that originally featured marine shows. The pool was retained and used as a mine pit for Underground.

The attraction was closed for the entire 2023 season, during which it was refurbished. It reopened in 2024 with a refurbishment by Gaff Box.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The Underground is located indoors and is kept in the dark. It has various characters designed by Themed Environments and Effects.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The first and last cars were removed from each train during the 2019 season. The last cars were added back on for 2020, but are currently not open to riders.

fullText:
Underground is a wooden enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA.

Underground opened on April 27, 1996. It was built atop a former amphitheater that originally featured marine shows. The pool was retained and used as a mine pit for Underground.

The attraction was closed for the entire 2023 season, during which it was refurbished. It reopened in 2024 with a refurbishment by Gaff Box.

The Underground is located indoors and is kept in the dark. It has various characters designed by Themed Environments and Effects.



The first and last cars were removed from each train during the 2019 season. The last cars were added back on for 2020, but are currently not open to riders.
